LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SEYFARTH SHAW LLP'S MOTION TO LIFT STAY IS DENIED FOR NOW WITH A FURTHER HEARING ON DECEMBER 1, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302. THERE IS A TRIAL DATE IN THE UNDERLYING ACTION ON NOVEMBER 7, 2016. AVOIDANCE OF PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFFS IN THAT CASE MANDATES THAT THE STRAY REMAIN IN PLACE IN THIS CASE. THE COURT WILL SIGN AN INTERIM ORDER. PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL IS TO PROVIDE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SEYFARTH SHAW LLP Motion To Lift Stay. Based on the parties' agreement, the court signed the proposed order lifting stay of action. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2017 Continued To May-31-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Roeca of Roeca Haas Montes de Oca, LLP telephone number 415-352-0980 for Plaintiff Robert Meister, Janice Meister and Kathryn Meister.
Justin Fields of Duane Morris LLP telephone number 415-957-3079 for Defendant Sefarth Shaw.

Mr. Roeca reported that the trial in the Santa Cruz underlying case is set for March 27, 2017 and that there is a stipulation and order to conclude discovery in January. Discussion was held. Defendant Seyfarth Shaw LLP's Motion To Lift Stay is continued to April 18, 2017 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 as a control date and for status on the underlying action. The stay will be lifted as of April 15, 2017 when the trial is concluded unless an application by one of the parties is filed to have the stay lifted sooner.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Continued To Jan-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay
Off Calendar Jun-03-2016 Continued To Dec-01-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Russell Roec of Roeca Haas Hager LLP telephone number 415-352-0980 for Plaintiffs Robert Meister, Janice Meister and Kathryn Meister.
Justi Fields of Duane Morris LLP telephone number 415-957-3709 for Seyfarth Shaw LLP

The matter was argued. The Court confirmed and modified its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SEYFARTH SHAW LLP'S Motion To Lift Stay is denied for now with a further hearing on December 1, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. There is a trial date in the underlying action on November 7, 2016. Avoidance of prejudice to plaintiffs in that case mandates that the stay remain in place in this case. The Court will sign an interim order. Plaintiffs' Counsel is to provide a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Lift Stay
Off Calendar Jun-01-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Russell S. Roeca, of RoecaHaasHagerLLP, Tel. 415.352.980, for plaintiffs;
Justin Fields, of Duane Morris, Tel. 415.957.3079, for defendants.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SEYFARTH SHAW LLP'S Motion To Lift Stay is denied without prejudice. There is no purpose in lifting the stay of this action as long as the underlying Mesinger action is ongoing. Order signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
